# 🧪 RapidCare Prototype Description

---

## 🎯 Objective

To demonstrate a working system that:

* Allocates ICU beds efficiently
* Connects patients with hospitals
* Enables admin control over resources

---

## 🖥️ Screens Overview

### 🔐 1. Login Page (3.html)

* User/Admin selection
* Local session handling

---

### 👤 2. User Dashboard (index.html)

* Input:

  * Patient details
  * Location
* Output:

  * Best hospital suggestion
  * ICU availability

---

### 📄 3. Consent Form

* Auto-generated PDF
* Includes patient details
* Downloadable

---

### 🏥 4. Admin Dashboard (2.html)

* View hospital data
* Update ICU beds
* Monitor patients

---

## 🔁 User Flow

```
Login
  ↓
Enter patient details
  ↓
Find best hospital
  ↓
Submit request
  ↓
Generate PDF
```

---

## 🧪 Example Scenario

1. Patient arrives in emergency
2. User enters details
3. System finds nearest hospital with ICU
4. Admin dashboard updates instantly

---

## ⚡ Prototype Highlights

* Real-time-like interaction via APIs
* Lightweight and deployable
* Simple and effective UI

---

## ⚠️ Limitations

* No authentication system
* No real GPS tracking
* SQLite not persistent

---

## 🚀 Future Enhancements

* AI-based triage system
* Map visualization
* Notifications system
* Mobile app version

---

## 🏁 Conclusion

RapidCare demonstrates how technology can improve emergency healthcare logistics with a scalable and efficient approach.
